name: climbx-cowork
description: ClimbX companion for Claude Cowork: turn niche outliers into voice-true X posts, schedule and track them, all backed by the ClimbX API.

CLIMBX_API_KEY.title: ClimbX API key
CLIMBX_API_KEY.description: Optional here: if this field is not prompted or left empty, just say 'set up ClimbX' in a session and the guided setup collects the key through a secure local page instead. Create the key in the ClimbX app under Settings > API (shown once).
